verses.text: Tua ni mahin tua inn panin Jesuh paikhia a, tuili gei-ah pai-in thuhilh dingin a tu hi
Ama kiimah a hong kikhawm mi tamlua ahih manin amah gunkuang tungah pai-in tu a, mihonte ahih leh tuili gei-ah a omsak hi
Amah in thugentehna a tuamtuam zangin thu tampi hilhin a genin-ah: “Khaici vawhpa khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi
Khaici a vawh ciangin pawlkhatte lolai lamdungah tu a, vasate hong leengin a ne uh hi
Pawlkhatte, suang a kitawphahna leidaina mun a tu hi. Lei thukloin lum ahih manin a khaici popah hi
Ahi zongin ni hong sat ciangin ankungte in zung thuk kha zolo uh ahih manin tua ankungnote vulin a keu hi
Pawlkhatte, lingbulsum a omna mun leilak tu a, lingbulsumte hong selin hong khang ahih manin ankungte a deepgawp hi
Ahi zongin pawlkhatte, lei hoihna mun tu-in hong khang hi. Pawlkhatte in a zah za khat, pawlkhatte in a zah sawmguk, adangte in a zah sawmthum a gah hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin
“Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu na za ta un,” ci-in Jesuh in a thugen a khum hi.
Tua ciangin nungzuite in Jesuh va naihin ama kiangah, “Bang hangin thugentehna zangin amaute tungah thu gen na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “Vantung ki-ukna tawh kisai thusim note tungah hong kihilh a, ahi zongin amaute tungah kihilhlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a neisate tungah kipia thuahin hau semsem ding a, a neilote tung panin a neihsa sunsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi
Amaute in enen napi-in mu theilo uh a, ngaingai napi-in za theilo, tel theilo uh ahih manin thugentehna zangin thu a gen ka hi hi
Kamsang Isaiah' thugenkholhna, hih thu tawh kisai-ah amau-a' dingin tung taktak hi. Tua a genna-ah, ‘Na zakzak uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi

Hih mite' lungsim mawl mahmah hi; a bil uh bingsak uh a, a mit uh a si uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le uh, a mit uh tawh mu-in, a bil uh tawh za-in, a lungsim un tel ding a, kei lamah amaute hong kihei-in, amaute ka damsak ding hi, ci-in Pasian in gen hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi
Ahi zongin note' mit in mu-in na bil un za ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi
Ahi taktakin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Kamsangte leh Pasian' mi tampite in note' muhte munuam mahmah napi-in mulo uh a, note' zakte zanuam mahmah napi-in zalo uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Khaici Vawhpa Thugentehna Telgen

verses.text: “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in khaici vawhpa thugentehna thu na ngai un

Mi pawlkhat in Pasian' hong ukna tawh kisai a lungdamhuai thu za napi-in a thu theitello uh ahih manin Dawimangpa hong pai-in amau lungsim sunga a kivawh thu a lakkhiatsak hi. Hih bangte pen lolai lampi dung a tu khaicite tawh kibang hi
Suang kitawphah leilak a tu khaicite pen Pasian' thu a zak ciangun lungdam takin a sangpahte a cihnopna ahi hi
Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum zolo ahih manin tawlkhat sung bek um uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian' thu hangin haksatna ahi a, bawlsiatna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh a tun' ciangin tawpkikpah uh hi

Lingbulsum omna leilakah a tu khaicite pen Pasian' thu za napi-in amau nuntakna sung uhah leitung lunghihmawhna leh hauh nopnate in Pasian' thu vuknelh ahih manin bangmah a suakkhia zolote a cihnopna ahi hi

Lei hoihna munah a tu khaicite pen Pasian' thu a zak ciangin a tel mite a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua bang mite-a' dingin Pasian' thu in man nei a, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah za khat, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah sawmguk, pawlkhatte-a' dingin a zah sawmthumin Pasian' thu in man a nei hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat gen a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh: A lo-ah taangci hoih a vawhpa tawh kibang hi
Ahi zongin zan khat, mite a ihmut kalun galte khat hong pai-in taang lakah tahum tang vawhin a paikhia hi
Taangte hong po-in a vuih hun ding ciangin tahum kungte zong hong lianin hong kilang hi
Tua ciangin loneipa' nasemte ama kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Na lolai-ah na vawh khaici pen taangci hoihte ahi hi. Hih tahumte koi pana hong piang ahi hiam?’ a cih ciangin
amah in, ‘Galte' vawh ahi hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi. A nasemte in ama kiangah, ‘Tua ahih leh kote va kuanin ka va bot ding uh hiam?’ ci-in a dong uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in, ‘Va bot kei un. Tahumte bot le uh cin taang tawh na botkhawm khading uh hi

Anlak hun mateng a nam nihin tuaci om phot hen. Anlak hun ciangin anlate kiangah, “Tahumte bot masa un la, meikhukah khul dingin lomhen un. Ahi zongin taangte la-in ka ansalah hong sung un,” ka ci ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat gen leuleu a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh, mi khat in a lo sungah a vawh ankam tang tawh kibang hi

Khaici khempeuh lak panin ankam tang a neupen ahi hi. Ahi zongin a khan'khit ciangin ankung lakah a golpen suak ahih manin vasate in a hiang tungah bu a tomtheihna zah ding ciang hong suak thei hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin thugentehna khat mah gen leuleu a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh, nupi khat in annel seu thum dim mek manin silngo sawh a, a vekpi-in silngo in zelin a pawmsak tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in hih thute khempeuh, thugentehna vive zangin thu hilh a, thugentehna zangloin thu khat beek a gen kei hi
Hih bangin thugentehna a zatna pen kamsang Isaiah in, “Thugentehna zangin thu ka gen ding a, leitung piancila kipan a kitheilo thute ka gen ding hi,” ci-in a genkholhsakna thu a tun'na ding ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Taang Lakah Tahum Thugentehna Telgen

verses.text: Tua ciangin mihonte lak panin Jesuh paikhia-in innsungah a lut hi. A nungzuite ama kiangah hong pai uh a, “Lolai-a om Tahum Thugentehna a khiatna hong gen in,” a cih uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Taangci hoih a vawhpa pen Mihing Tapa ahi hi
Lolai pen leitung hi a, taangci hoih i cih pen Pasian' ukna sungah a om mite ahi uh hi. Tahumte pen Gilopa tawh a kipawl mite hi a
tahum tang a vawh galpa pen Dawimangpa ahi hi. Anlak hun pen leitung beina ding hun hi a, anla nasemte pen vantung mite ahi hi
Tahumte kikaikhawmin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum mah bangin leitung bei hun ciangin tua bangmahin kihih ding hi
Mihing Tapa in a vantung mite hong sawl ding a, ama ukna sungah a om migilote leh mi a mawhna dingin a bawl mi khempeuh kaikhawmin
meikhukpi sungah tua bang mite lawn ding uh a, tua lai-ah amaute kapin a hagawi ding uh hi
Tua hun ciangin Pasian' mite ahih leh a Pa uh Ukna sungah ni bangin a taang ding uh hi. Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu na za ta un.

“Vantung ki-ukna pen lolai-ah a kiseel sum tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in a muh ciangin limtakin a seelpha hi. Amah lungdam mahmahin a inn-ah ciahpah a, a neih khempeuh a zuak khit ciangin tua lo a lei hi.
“Vantung ki-ukna pen sumbawlpa in a zon' kep hoihpente tawh zong kibang hi
Sumbawlpa in a manpha diak pawl kep khat a muh ciangin ciahpahin a neih khempeuh a zuak khit ciangin tua kep a lei hi.
“Vantung ki-ukna pen tui sungah kipai-in ngasa namkim a awkna ngen tawh zong kibang hi
Ngasa tampi tak a awk ciangin ngabengte in tui gei-ah a ngen uh kaikhia-in tusuk uh a, nektheih ding ngasate, paipel sungah guangin, nektheihloh ding ngasate, a lawnkhia uh hi
Leitung hun bei ciangin zong tua bangmah hi ding hi. Vantung mite hong pai-in mihoihte lak panin migilote lakhia-in
meikhukpi sungah tua migilote a khul ding uh hi. Tua lai-ah kapin a hagawi ding uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Sumkhol A Lui leh A Thak

verses.text: “Hih ka thugente khempeuh a khiatna na thei uh hiam?” ci-in Jesuh in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Ka thei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Vantung ki-ukna sungah a hong lut Thukham hilh siate khempeuh pen, a sumkholna panin a thak leh a lui, a ut utin a lakhia thei ziau ziau sumneipa tawh kibang uh hi,” a ci hi.
Jesuh in hih thugentehnate a gen khit ciangin tua lai panin paikhia-in

ama khua-ah pai a, kikhopna innsungah thu a hilh hi. Ama thugen a za mite in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa in hih bang pilna koilai panin ngah a, bang hangin hih bang na lamdangte bawlthei ahi hiam
Khutsiampa' tapa hi lel a, a nu zong Mary a kicinu hilel hilo ahi hiam? Ama naute zong James, Josef, Simon leh Judas hilo ahi uh hiam
A nau numeite zong hih lai mah-a om hilo ahi uh hiam? Tua bang hinapi-in hih mipa in koi lai panin hih bang thuteng ngahthei ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin amah a sangzo kei uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kamsang khat pen, ama khua, ama behte, leh ama innsung longal-ah kizahtakin pahtawina a ngah hi,” a ci hi
Nazareth khuamite in amah a uplohna hangin tua khua-ah na lamdang tampi a bawl kei hi.
